title: tagetes tenuiflora
intro: Tagetes tenuiflora, also known as Mexican marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antiviral properties, which can aid in wound healing and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Tagetes tenuiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Tagetes tenuiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
